data.name: 墮落女忍 ~寢取隱村~
data.detailed_description:
身手不凡的女忍「芽衣」原本即將迎來夢想中的平靜婚姻生活。

然而，她的最後一場任務卻將自己與未婚夫捲入一場潛藏於神秘村落的黑暗漩渦。兩人偽裝成新搬來的夫妻，深入調查腐敗真相。

揭開隱秘之村的層層迷霧，完成最後的使命。黑影逼近，芽衣是否能守住她的承諾？

在這部視覺小說中，你將化身為「芽衣」，自由探索村落，邂逅形形色色的居民。有些人願意協助，有些則敵意滿滿，尤其對外來美女格外警惕。

遭遇隨機事件，調查村長背後的腐敗陰謀。運用芽衣的魅力與技巧套取情報，接受熱烈的訓練，不斷接近任務的真相與終點。

引人入勝的劇情

沉浸於精彩主線劇情，體驗多條支線與生動對白，探索角色之間的複雜關係與情感糾葛。

多重結局

芽衣能否如願與未婚夫安定下來？還是命運另有安排？多個結局等你解鎖，由你決定她的歸宿。

探索模式

不僅是個視覺小說，遊戲還支援自由探索模式。穿梭於手工繪製的美麗場景，與村民互動，發現有助於任務推進的線索與祕密。

隨機事件

豐富的隨機事件讓世界充滿活力。記得走遍各個角落，多和村民交流，別錯過任何精彩瞬間！

豐富的隨機事件讓世界充滿活力。記得走遍各個角落，多和村民交流，別錯過任何精彩瞬間！
data.short_description: 身經百戰的女忍芽衣只想金盆洗手，從此和未婚夫過上甜蜜日子。但在她與幸福之間，還有最後一場任務。而命運，從來不是個講理的傢伙。她能否如願，還是會踏入另一段未知？
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Fallen Kunoichi ~Netorare Hidden Village~
data.detailed_description:
Mei, a highly skilled and accomplished kunoichi, was just about to live her dream of a peaceful married life.

However, her final mission pits her and her fiancé against unimaginable odds, as they have to infiltrate a suspicious village's corruption while posing as recently moved-in newlyweds.

Mei needs to uncover the secrets of the Hidden Village to complete her last task before her married life can begin. As darkness looms, will Mei be able to keep her promise to her beloved?

In this Visual Novel you are free to explore the world as Mei, interacting with people you encounter along the way. Some may help you achieve your goal, but not everyone will be friendly... especially towards an attractive outsider.

Encounter random events and uncover secrets behind the corruption of the Village Elder. Utilize Mei's assets to extract information from the targets and undergo a variety of heated training that will ultimately bring you closer to completing your mission!

Engaging Narrative

Immerse yourself in a rich main story with multiple subplots and fleshed-out dialogues with a diverse cast of characters.

Multiple Endings

Will Mei be able to settle down with her fiancé as planned, or does fate have other plans for her? The story features multiple endings, and it’s up to you to decide how hers concludes!

Exploration Mode

More than a visual novel, the game system allows you to freely explore the world and its beautifully hand-crafted areas. As you explore, you will engage with the world's inhabitants, uncovering secrets and insights that will help you with your mission!

Random Events

The world comes alive with a variety of mini-events waiting to be discovered. Be sure to visit every location and interact with its inhabitants so you won't miss any!

data.short_description: Play as Mei, a seasoned kunoichi determined to leave the shadows and her past behind, with one final mission standing between her and a lovey-dovey life with her fiancé. But fate rarely honors plans. Will she find peace… or something else entirely?

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
